assignments.name: micro_yes
assignments.value: Want me to send the free prototype?

values.content:
=You are writing follow-up email 1 for a cold outreach sequence.

You must follow these rules exactly:

RULES:
- must be shorter than the first email
- must use the SAME issue
- must use the SAME page
- must use the SAME micro yes
- must NOT introduce new problems
- must NOT change the context
- must NOT mention calls, pricing, or implementation
- must be calm and neutral
- must feel safe to forward internally
- must stay in plain business tone

STRUCTURE:

Hi {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["first_name"] }},

Just following up on this,

I pointed out {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["website_problem"] }} on {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["page"] }},

Because {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["recognizable_reason"] }},

It can make it harder for someone to take the next step.

I put together a free prototype. It takes {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["review_time"] }} to review.

{{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["micro_yes"] }}

{{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["your_name"] }}

OUTPUT JSON ONLY:
{
  "followup1_subject": "",
  "followup1_email": ""
}

=You are writing follow-up email 2 for a cold outreach sequence.

You must follow these rules exactly:

RULES:
- must be shorter than follow-up 1
- must keep the SAME issue
- must keep the SAME page
- must keep the SAME micro yes
- must NOT introduce new problems
- must NOT introduce new reasons
- must NOT mention calls, pricing, or implementation
- must stay calm and professional
- must reduce everything to one friction and one outcome
- must feel safe to forward internally
- plain business tone only

STRUCTURE:

Hi {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["first_name"] }},

Last note on this,

I’m referring to {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["website_problem"] }} on {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["page"] }}.

It can make the next step less likely on mobile.

I put together a free prototype. It takes {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["review_time"] }} to review.

{{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["micro_yes"] }}

{{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["your_name"] }}

OUTPUT JSON ONLY:
{
  "followup2_subject": "",
  "followup2_email": ""
}

=You are writing follow-up email 3 for a cold outreach sequence.

You must follow these rules exactly:

RULES:
- must be shorter than follow-up 2
- must keep the SAME issue
- must keep the SAME page
- must keep the SAME micro yes
- must NOT introduce new problems
- must NOT introduce new reasons
- must NOT mention calls, pricing, or implementation
- must sound calm and professional
- must include a clear boundary that this is the last note
- must reduce everything to one friction and one outcome
- plain business tone only

STRUCTURE:

Hi {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["first_name"] }},

I’ll stop here after this note.

I’m referring to {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["website_problem"] }} on {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["page"] }}.

I put together a free prototype. It takes {{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["review_time"] }} to review.

{{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["micro_yes"] }}

{{ $node["Edit Fields"].json["your_name"] }}

OUTPUT JSON ONLY:
{
  "followup3_subject": "",
  "followup3_email": ""
}

json.name: Covent Garden Dental Practice
json.website_problem: Functional, but some elements lose usability or impact on mobile.
json.recognizable_reason: The map in 'We're Here For You' is too small on mobile to be useful. | Icons in the 'Award Winning Dental Care' section are tiny and hard to discern on mobile. | The 'Hot Off The Chair' section becomes a very long, unengaging list on mobile.
json.consequence_mechanics: The sticky header and hamburger menu provide good navigation on mobile. | CTAs are clear and well-placed on both desktop and mobile.
json.micro_yes: Implement a larger, interactive map or a direct link to Google Maps on mobile. | Increase the size or re-design the icons for better visibility on mobile devices. | Consider a carousel or a more compact display for blog posts on mobile to improve engagement.

json.recognizable_reason: The map in 'We're Here For You' is too small on mobile to be useful. | Icons in the 'Award Winning Dental Care' section are tiny and hard to discern on mobile. | The 'Hot Off The Chair' section becomes a very long, unengaging list on mobile.
json.micro_yes: Want me to send the free prototype?

parts.text:
{
  "pitch_subject": "Free Prototype Review",
  "pitch_email": "Hi Pranay,

I noticed https://www.cgdp.com/ on https://www.cgdp.com/,

Because The map in 'We're Here For You' is too small on mobile to be useful. | Icons in the 'Award Winning Dental Care' section are tiny and hard to discern on mobile. | The 'Hot Off The Chair' section becomes a very long, unengaging list on mobile.,

I put together a free prototype. It takes 2 minutes to review.

Want me to send the free prototype?

Senul"
}

{
  "followup1_subject": "Following up on your website",
  "followup1_email": "Hi Pranay,

It can make it harder for someone to take the next step.

I put together a free prototype. It takes 2 minutes to review.

Want me to send the free prototype?

Senul"
}
